entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
About Me

I am Jiatong Li. I am currently a M.S. student major in data science at University of Science and Technology of China (USTC), supervised by Prof. Qi Liu. I got my B.S. degree at USTC in 2022. My research interest includes data mining, deep learning, causal inference, Bayesian learning, and educational measurement. I have abundant research experience in data mining, and published one of my research papers in SIGKDD. I have also paper review experience in top conferences and journals such as NeuraIPS, TKDE, and EDM. In 2021–2022, I used to do internship in Alibaba and iFLYTEK.

中文版本点击这里.

Publications

  1. Jiatong Li, Fei Wang, Qi Liu, Mengxiao Zhu, Wei Huang, Zhenya Huang*, Enhong Chen, Yu Su, Shĳin Wang (2022). HierCDF: A Bayesian Network-based Hierarchical Cognitive Diagnosis Framework. In KDD (pp. 904–913). ACM. [PDF][Code]
entry.summary:
About Me

I am Jiatong Li. I am currently a M.S. student
